text: No one stands on the top of the world. Not you, not me, not even God. But the unbearable vacancy of the throne in the sky is over. From now on, I will be sitting in it.
context: Aizen speaking to Ichigo after revealing his plan to ascend to the throne of heaven.

text: If fate is a millstone, then we are the grain. Nothing can be done, so I've memorized the way the grain feels.
context: Ichigo reflecting on his struggle and the nature of battle early in the series.

text: It is not a sin to fight for one's pride. But you must never forget that once you raise your sword, you commit yourself to the battle and stake your life upon it.
context: Byakuya lecturing Renji on the discipline and weight of being a Shinigami.
